money_flow_summary: Money flows through crypto via trading fees (exchanges), gas fees (blockchains), DeFi yield (liquidity provision), and speculation (token price appreciation). The key insight for 2026: institutional adoption has arrived but tooling for retail remains immature — there are massive automation opportunities between protocols and users. AI agents are becoming first-class on-chain actors.

niches.name: AI Agents on Blockchain (Autonomous Economic Agents)

top_opportunities.title: AI Autonomous Economic Agent on Base/Solana (Fetch.ai-style)
top_opportunities.niche: AI Agents on Blockchain (Autonomous Economic Agents)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build an on-chain AI agent that performs services for other agents/humans autonomously — data lookup, computation, price negotiation — and charges micro-fees per task. Deploy on Base or Solana where gas is near-zero. As AI agent ecosystems grow (Virtuals Protocol, ElizaOS, etc.), infrastructure agents become critical nodes that capture fee flow.
top_opportunities.moat: First-mover in a rapidly expanding ecosystem; network effects as more agents integrate your service
top_opportunities.first_step: Read Virtuals Protocol and ElizaOS documentation; build a simple Base-deployed agent that provides 1 paid service (e.g., off-chain data fetch)
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: This IS the AI agent opportunity — building autonomous software that earns crypto fees while you sleep, in an ecosystem purpose-built for agent-to-agent commerce

top_opportunities.title: Stablecoin Yield Maximizer App (Defi Yield Routing)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a mobile/web app that connects user's wallets (MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet) and automatically routes stablecoin holdings to the highest-yielding protocol (Aave, Morpho, Pendle, Sky) based on risk tolerance. Charge 10% of yield as performance fee. With $10M TVL earning 8% APY = $80k/yr gross yield; 10% cut = $8k/yr. Scale to $100M TVL.
top_opportunities.moat: Security track record (no hacks) is the ultimate moat in DeFi; multi-protocol access is difficult to replicate safely
top_opportunities.first_step: Deploy on testnet; get smart contract audit from Code4rena/Sherlock; launch with $50k cap and transparent risk parameters
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI monitors protocol risk scores, liquidity depth, and gas optimization in real-time to route funds more efficiently than any human treasury manager

top_opportunities.title: On-Chain Wallet Intelligence Newsletter (Whale Watching SaaS)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor top 1,000 known wallets (VC funds, protocol treasuries, known whales) on Ethereum/Solana. Use LLM to interpret on-chain transactions: 'a16z just moved 50M USDC to Aave' or 'This wallet bought $5M ETH before every major rally in 2025'. Send daily Telegram/email digest. Charge $29-$99/mo retail; $299-$999/mo for API access to hedge funds.
top_opportunities.moat: Curated wallet labeling database is time-consuming to replicate; subscriber community drives virality
top_opportunities.first_step: Use Etherscan API + Dune Analytics to track 100 labeled wallets; set up daily digest email; launch free Substack to build audience
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI interprets complex multi-step on-chain transactions (like token swaps through 5 protocols) and explains them in plain English investor language

top_opportunities.title: Crypto Tax Automation Tool (Better CoinTracker)
top_opportunities.how_money_is_made: Build a tool that connects to 50+ CEXs and wallets via API, imports all transactions, calculates cost basis using FIFO/LIFO/HIFO, handles DeFi edge cases (liquidity provision, staking rewards, bridging), and generates IRS Form 8949. Charge $49-$299/yr based on transaction count. Target the 10M+ US crypto holders who need to file taxes. CoinTracker is slow — the market is wide open.
top_opportunities.moat: Tax filing deadline creates annual lock-in; transaction history creates switching cost
top_opportunities.first_step: Build Coinbase + Binance API transaction importers; implement FIFO cost basis calculator; launch free for <100 transactions
top_opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI classifies ambiguous DeFi transactions (is staking reward income or return of capital?) using tax code knowledge that rules engines can't handle
